title: avena sterilis var. maxima
intro: Avena sterilis var. maxima, commonly known as wild oats or great oatgrass, is a tall, annual grass that belongs to the Avena species. The plant is used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic, anti-inflammatory, and sedative effects. Avena sterilis var. maxima has been used to treat various health issues, such as insomnia, anxiety, and digestive problems, offering benefits like promoting relaxation, reducing stress, and soothing digestive issues. The plant can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
